query: brachytherapy bowel perforation management guidelines emergency

results.title: Active small bowel sparing in intracavitary brachytherapy for cervical cancer.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 34958091. 2022/03/03 00:00. PURPOSE: This study describes late bowel morbidity prospectively 
assessed in the multi-institutional EMBRACE study on MRI-guided adaptive 
brachytherapy in locally advanced cervical cancer (LACC).
MATERIALS/METHODS: A total of 1176 patients were analyzed. Physician reported 
morbidity (CTCAE v.3.0) and patient reported outcome (PRO) (EORTC QLQ C30/CX24) 
were assessed at baseline and at regular follow-up.
RESULTS: At 3/5 years the actuarial incidence of bo
